entries.summary: Phase 6 completed: Documentation & Claims fixes. Updated PyInstaller docstring branding, fixed OpenVINO→GGUF references, added explicit CHANGE_ME placeholders to Inno Setup script, qualified performance claims with measurement conditions, and made context_truncation configurable via RAG_CONTEXT_TRUNCATION environment variable.
top_rejection_reasons: Test file inconsistency - branding change affected test assertion
lessons_learned: Documentation fixes require checking related test files for consistency (Task 6.1 test file needed updating)
Placeholder values should use explicit patterns like CHANGE_ME with TODO comments to indicate customization required
Performance claims should always include measurement conditions for credibility
